name: codixing
description:
Code retrieval engine that saves your AI agent 73% of its token budget. Replaces grep with ranked, AST-aware search — so models spend tokens reasoning, not reading. BM25 + semantic hybrid retrieval, dependency graphs with PageRank ranking, and trigram-accelerated grep — all running locally with zero cloud dependencies.

57 MCP tools cover the full development loop: search by symbol or natural language, trace dependencies, predict change impact, discover test coverage, review complexity, and navigate unfamiliar codebases. Five built-in slash commands (/codixing-setup, /codixing-explore, /codixing-review, /codixing-preflight, /codixing-release) provide guided workflows for project onboarding, architecture exploration, dependency-aware code review, duplicate detection, and automated releases. Tested at scale on the Linux kernel (73K files, 1.6s cold start). Runs on macOS, Linux, and Windows.
